TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Gary_Brokaw, title = Gary_Brokaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gary_Brokaw} }

S.FORM: Gary Brokaw sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1954, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 1, Gary Brokaw, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Gary Brokaw sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1954, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 1, Gary Brokaw, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ɣarj βrokaw s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ɣarj βrokaw, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
